ORDER CONFRIMING ARBITRATION AWARD. GRANTED.

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER FUJISOFT AMERICA, INC. NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS. GRANTED. DEFENDANT TOKIOS, INC. IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE FULL AND COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO (1) FIRST SET OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR INTERROGATORIES AND (2) FIRST SET OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 20 DAYS (FEBRUARY 28, 2024). PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1660. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM KHUIBONHOA@DUANEMORRIS.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery Requests; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Feb-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER FUJISOFT AMERICA, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery Requests.

Granted. Defendant Tokios, Inc. is ordered to provide full and compliant responses to (1) First Set of Judgment Debtor Interrogatories and (2) First Set of Judgment Debtor Requests for Production of Documents within 20 days (February 28, 2024). Plaintiff's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $1660.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed form of order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem khuibonhoa@duanemorris.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/jpt)

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER FUJISOFT AMERICA, INC.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Fujisoft America, Inc.'s unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
